happy_samples.result_text:
# Scaling Postgres for Analytics Workloads
URL: https://example.com/blog/scaling-postgres
Author: Jane Doe

# Scaling Postgres for Analytics Workloads

A practical guide to keeping analytical queries fast as the dataset grows.

## Partitioning

Range-partition large fact tables by date so the planner can prune irrelevant partitions.

## Indexing

Use partial and covering indexes for the hottest query paths; avoid indexing low-selectivity columns.

## Connection pooling

Put a pooler in front of the database to cap backend connections under load.
